subject: exphash algorithm
truth: The export hash (exphash) algorithm changed from SHA-256 to MD5 to match imphash.
quote: Exphash from sha256 to md5 to match imphash

subject: IOError exception
truth: IOError has been replaced with OSError; code catching IOError will no longer catch exceptions from pefile.

subject: Python 2.7 support
old: Python 2.7 compatibility code and ability to run on Python 2.7
truth: Stop using pefile on Python 2.7; it is no longer supported and legacy Python 2 code has been removed.

from_fact: python 2.7 compatibility code and ability to run on python 2.7

subject: __data__ attribute type
truth: Stop relying on __data__ being immutable; it is now a bytearray and may be mutated in place.
quote: Turn __data__ into a bytearray to avoid copying data around (from elicn)
